title: Cleft Sentences
description: Rozštěpené věty — důraz na konkrétní část věty.

examples.cz: Cleft:    It was TOM who broke the window.  (not someone else)

examples.en: Normal:   She called me last night.
examples.cz: Cleft:    It was LAST NIGHT that she called me.  (not another time)

examples.en: Normal:   The loud music bothered us.
examples.cz: Cleft:    It was THE LOUD MUSIC that bothered us.
Wh-cleft: What I want is a holiday.
Wh-cleft: What she needs is more time.
Wh-cleft: What this project requires is teamwork.

examples.en: Normal:   He did was check the figures again.
examples.cz: Wh-cleft: What he did was (to) check the figures again.

tasks: 1. Write 3 it-cleft sentences emphasising different parts of:
2. Complete these wh-clefts with your own information:
3. Write a short paragraph (6 sentences) using at least 2 cleft structures
